story.text: Chronicle of blades forged on spellweb.ai. Each blade is a crystallised proof of attention — a traversal of the 64-Tetrahedra Lattice, named by its smith, carrying its constellation inscribed within. The forge doesn't care how you struck the metal. It only cares what blade you hold.

**** 
The progression from test to taxonomy to territory, demonstrated March 29, 2026.

The blades span from high-velocity temporal drills (Polished Key: 3 nodes, 42 laps) to wide-net spatial constellations (Understanding: 17 nodes, 714 transitions), all anchored in the 64-Tetrahedra Lattice. Velocity and breadth are orthogonal strategies for the same goal: behavioural density that exceeds the reconstruction ceiling.

## The nine forged blades

*9 blades, each a crystallised proof of attention across the 64-Tetrahedra Lattice.*

- [[The Phase Space Blade]]
- [[The Temporal Intensity Blade]]
- [[The Trinity Architecture Blade]]
- [[The Definitive Universe Blade]]
- [[The Ceremony Engine Blade]]
- [[The Wide-Net Heavy Blade]]
- [[The 64-Lap Inferno]]
- [[The Honest Sun Blade]]
- [[The Amnesia Path Blade]]
